title: Grappling Rod
description: This Datapack Turns Fishing Rods Into Grappling Hooks!
body:
This Datapack Turns Fishing Rods Into Grappling Hooks While Also Retaining Its Ability Fish!
Just Download The Data Pack and To install, place the .zip file in the datapacks folder of your Minecraft world. Then, reload the world or use the /reload command. then do 

```
/function pack:grappling_hook
```
and after that just take a fishing rod anduse it on anywhere just not on water and see the magic!
- The grappling hook has a range limit of as many blocks the fishing bobber can reach
- doesn't work underwater.
- can't pull mobs(you can leash the mobs then use it to reach somewhare and the mobs will some what go with you)
